subject: revision - black marlin - meter 986782 for 8/98 - ua4

emails.subject: Revision - Black Marlin - meter 986782 for 8/98 - UA4
emails.subject_base: Revision - Black Marlin - meter 986782 for 8/98 - UA4
emails.body: Revision Black Marlin meter 986782 for 8/98 UA4 Revision According to measurement, there is flow of 7,394 in 8/98, however, there is nothing to indicate this is gas that was received on HPL in OSS. I checked MIPs and there is a measurement statement that supports the flow rate of 7,394 MMBTu. Daren is there a deal in CPR which may not have fed over to OSS? I checked OSS for the whole year of 1998 and there are no other deals in OSS. It does seem strange that this is the only month of flow. Thanks, Stella
